segments.text: Come on, incredible! I see. Going for the double up!
segments.original_text: さあ、うますぎ。なるほど。ダブルアップを狙う。

segments.text: First time seeing that in a tournament!
segments.original_text: あれやってるの大会で初めて見た。

segments.text: Reading it. Knew about it as a gimmick, but actually using it in tournament!
segments.original_text: 合わせる。ネタとしても知ってるが、やはり実戦投入。
グルトンは見せるのか?エネルギー、エネルギー。

segments.text: Nice play, but they got KO'd!
segments.original_text: うまいけど、撃墜しちゃった。

full_text: Come on, incredible! I see. Going for the double up! First time seeing that in a tournament! Reading it. Knew about it as a gimmick, but actually using it in tournament! Gluttony showing? Energy, energy! Nice play, but they got KO'd!
